subcodes.first_line: O My handmaid! Be thou eloquent with this utterance which hath dawned from the horizon of the mouth of the All-Merciful, O My Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز من باین بیان که از مشرق فم رحمن اشراق نموده ناطق باش ای پروردگار من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for women, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
